description: Spanish subsidiary of Bupa providing private health insurance to individuals and employers. Offers comprehensive health coverage including digital health services, telemedicine, and wellness programs.
business_model: B2B2C - Health insurance sold through employers; B2C individual plans
target_market: Spanish employers and individuals seeking private health coverage
competitive_advantage: Part of global Bupa network, comprehensive coverage, digital-first approach

varden_fit.rationale: Major Spanish insurer - potential partner for occupational health services integration
